title: [CR] compact_cot.rs: PLI_TOTAL_SIZE is 17 but aprs_is.rs expects 18 bytes
description:
File: rust/lichen-core/src/compact_cot.rs vs rust/lichen-gateway/src/aprs_is.rs

Issue: compact_cot.rs defines PLI_TOTAL_SIZE = 17 (1 byte subtype + 16 bytes payload). However, aprs_is.rs::CompactCot::from_bytes() expects 18 bytes and reads data[17] as reserved. The to_bytes() method also writes 18 bytes with out[17] = 0.

This is a wire format mismatch between two modules in the same project. One says PLI is 17 bytes, the other says 18 bytes.

Fix: Reconcile the two definitions. Either both should use 17 bytes or both should use 18 bytes (with reserved field).
